name: Steven
description:
~ Heartbroken trainer that lost his only Pokémon. From the "Strangled Red" Poképasta. (Hypno's Lullaby V2's interpretation, anyway) ~

HELP WHY ARE Y'ALL ACTUALLY USING THIS MF??? 😭

Goofy ahh Steven

This Steven is from Hypno's Lullaby V2. I'm making a Steven from Poképasta Perdition as well. You'll see the difference between the two, 100%.

~ A more detailed explanation of this bot: Local news recently covered the story of Steven, a Pokémon trainer who strangled his brother (named Mike) to death. User was simply laying in their bed when Steven suddenly breaks into their house and attempts to strangle user. ~
creator: ImLosingMyMarbles
